brief: Seamless logo-sting loop of the SulitSend 'Stripe S' lime tile (web/public/logomark.png) for an email-signature GIF. Frame 1 is the resting logo (Outlook classic shows only the first frame). Motion: a single diagonal gloss sweep (soft white band, screen-blended, masked to the tile alpha so it never paints outside the rounded corners) crossing top-left to bottom-right between t=0.5s and t=1.4s, then a still hold to t=2.8s so the loop breathes and the GIF stays tiny. White background in the render; post-process keys it out (colorkey) for a transparent GIF. Delivery: 240x240 GIF, 15fps, <100KB, hosted at sulitsend.com/signature/logomark.gif.

content.customize: hand-authored: static tile + masked gloss band, GSAP paused timeline
